note: Lab/vital monitoring map DERIVED from each peptide's locked protocol monitoring text. Every item is extracted ONLY from that peptide's own monitoring lines (provenance in 'from'); no lab is added that is not present in the source text (no-invention guardrail). trigger_type baseline vs followup; evidence_level A where the peptide is FDA-approved, else C (monitoring-derived, not a label-grade per-lab claim). The lab-recommendation engine may only recommend labs that appear here. No doses, no prescribing.
note_empty: These agents name no laboratory test in their locked monitoring text (monitoring is functional/symptom/screen-based); no labs are recommended for them by design.
